## Meeting Purpose

[Leadership weekly sync to discuss company growth, hiring, and operational processes.](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Company is experiencing rapid growth, reaching \~45 employees](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Hiring challenges for engineering roles due to competitive market](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Need to refine and standardize operational processes, especially for client onboarding and management](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Planning bi-weekly all-hands meetings and leadership offsite to improve communication and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Hiring

  - [Company has grown to \~45 employees, surpassing expectations](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Facing challenges in hiring engineers due to competitive compensation in AI companies](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Discussing strategies to attract top talent, including higher cash compensation and equity packages](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Considering flexibility in compensation to secure key hires, even if it means temporary inconsistency](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Client Management and Expectations

  - [Struggling with misaligned expectations for high-paying clients ($40k/month range)](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Need to improve storytelling and demonstration of value to clients](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Developing additional work streams like programmatic SEO to meet client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Working on refining processes for scale, especially for new offerings beyond editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

### Operational Processes and Communication

  - [Planning bi-weekly all-hands meetings to improve company-wide communication](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)
  - [Discussing optimal timing and format for all-hands to accommodate global team](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating engaging content for all-hands, including customer highlights and team member presentations](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)
  - [Leadership team planning an offsite to discuss and align on operational cadence, rituals, and best practices](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)

### Product Development

  - [Switching from U.Con to Perplexity Research for improved research capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Daniel working on programmatic SEO automation, facing time constraints due to other priorities](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Need to develop toolkit-based processes for programmatic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=2643.0)

### Onboarding and Training

  - [Matthew (new hire) expressing desire to deeply understand all aspects of the business](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Planning to create documentation and mini-courses based on leadership interviews and onboarding experiences](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
  - [Emphasis on enabling team members to showcase the platform's capabilities to clients](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=2233.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule and plan bi-weekly all-hands meetings](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)
  - [Finalize details for upcoming leadership offsite](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)
  - [Develop comprehensive onboarding and training materials](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
  - [Refine client onboarding and expectation-setting processes](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Continue work on programmatic SEO automation](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Review and adjust compensation strategies for key hires](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Create a structured operational cadence and ritual document](https://fathom.video/share/7w9zGrDWCDxLySr_svx2_75UjSnyE1Qc?tab=summary&timestamp=3031.0)
